tooltip.backgroundImage: Set background image for the graph
tooltip.selectGraphType: Select the type of graph to create
tooltip.manageRelationsDisabled: Relations are fixed for this graph type
tooltip.reassignEntities: Reassign entities of an imported graph
tooltip.deleteRelation: Remove this relation definition. Existing graph data using it is not deleted.

Settings.DebugHint: Writes verbose logs to the console for troubleshooting.

Errors.ExportFailed: Export failed. See console for details.
Errors.ImportParseFailed: Could not read the file. Make sure it is a valid JSON graph export.
Errors.ImportInvalidFile: This file does not appear to be a valid Foundry Graph export.
Errors.ImportSaveFailed: The graph was parsed but could not be saved. Check the console for details.

Notifications.ExportPrepare: Preparing high-resolution export… this may take a few seconds for large graphs.
Notifications.ImportIdCollision: A graph with ID "{oldId}" already exists. Imported with new ID: {newId}.
Notifications.GraphOpenPermissionDenied: You do not have permission to open graph "{name}".
Notifications.WorldStorageMigrationFailed: Foundry Graph: failed to migrate graph "{name}" to the world storage folder. It will continue using the old file path.
Notifications.WorldStorageMigrationDone: Foundry Graph: graph JSON files migrated to the world storage folder used for graph exports. Old files were left in place and can be removed manually after backup verification.
Notifications.ScaledSceneExportUnavailableZoom: Scaled scene export is available only when the map is close enough to the provider native max zoom.
Notifications.ScaledSceneExportUnavailableRenderer: Scaled scene export is not available for this renderer.
Notifications.SavingScaledSceneImage: Saving scaled scene image. Scale: {scale}; grid: {gridSize} px / {feetPerSquare} ft.
Notifications.ScaledSceneNoImagePath: Scaled scene export did not return a saved image path.
Notifications.ScaledSceneCreateFailed: Failed to create scaled scene from map image
Notifications.GraphImageSaveFailed: Failed to save graph image to world folder
Notifications.OnlyGMSaveWorldData: Only GM can save data at the world-level.
Notifications.CannotLinkNodeToItself: Cannot link a node to itself.
Notifications.ValidRelationRequired: Please select a valid relation type before creating the link.
Notifications.SelectNodeBeforeGroup: Select at least one node with Ctrl/Cmd + click before creating a group.
Notifications.CannotAddEntityGraphType: You cannot add a {type} on this graph type.
Notifications.NoSheetAvailable: No sheet available for this document.
Notifications.DatesUpdateFailed: Failed to update dates. See console for details.
Notifications.CannotAddEntityTimeline: You cannot add a {type} on this timeline.
Notifications.CannotAddEntityToTimeline: You cannot add a {type} to this timeline.
Notifications.VisNotLoaded: [foundry-graph] vis.js is not loaded. Add it to module.json as a library.
Notifications.TimelineFreeEvent: "{title}" is a free event with no linked document.
Notifications.CanOnlyDropEntitiesOnSlots: You can only drop entities on slots.
Notifications.SlotCannotAcceptActor: Slot "{slot}" cannot accept this Actor type.
Notifications.SlotCannotAcceptPage: Slot "{slot}" cannot accept this Page type.
Notifications.SlotCannotAcceptScene: Slot "{slot}" cannot accept this Scene type.
Notifications.SlotCannotAcceptItem: Slot "{slot}" cannot accept this Item type.
Notifications.UnsupportedDropGraph: Dropping {type} on this graph is not yet supported.
Notifications.PleaseActivateLinking: Please activate linking mode and select a source node before adding a new node.
Notifications.PleaseSelectOneNodeBeforeLinking: Please select one node before linking or activate linking mode.
Notifications.CannotAddJournalPageGenealogy: You cannot add a Journal Page on a genealogy tree.
Notifications.CannotAddSceneGenealogy: You cannot add a Scene on a genealogy tree.
Notifications.CannotAddItemGenealogy: You cannot add an Item on a genealogy tree.
Notifications.MovingNode: Moving "{name}" — Ctrl+drop on a target parent
Notifications.CannotMoveOwnDescendant: Cannot move a node onto one of its own descendants.
Notifications.ReassignUnsupported: This graph type does not support entity reassignment.
Notifications.ReassignAllValid: All entities in "{name}" are valid in this world.

GraphPage.Title: Graph Page
GraphPage.Hint: Set Foundry Graph flags for this Journal Page.

DeletionDialog.Title: Deletion Warning
DeletionDialog.RangeDropHint: Range item placed — drag the right edge to set the end date.
DeletionDialog.WarningRemoveFromDiagrams: Deleting it will remove it from these diagrams. Proceed?

Relations.RemovedOrphanWarning: {count} relation(s) were removed from the relation list ({ids}). Existing graph links or timeline items using those relation IDs were not deleted and are now orphaned; replace or remove them manually from the graph.
Relations.DeleteNotice: Relation "{label}" was removed from the relation list. Existing graph data using relation ID "{id}" is not deleted and must be replaced or removed manually from the graph.
Relations.DuplicateId: Relation ID "{id}" is duplicated. IDs must be unique.

Dialogs.CreateSceneContent:
Graph image saved to {filePath}.

Create a new scene using this image as background?
Dialogs.EndpointLabelTip: Tip: leave empty to hide the endpoint label.
Dialogs.DissolveGroupConfirm: Dissolve group "{label}"? Nodes will not be deleted.
Dialogs.ReassignNoAutomaticMatches: No automatic matches could be found. The entities above will remain unlinked.
Dialogs.EditDatesNote: Edit the start and end dates for this timeline item. Changes will be saved to the document flags.
Dialogs.ConvertJournalNote: The journal entry and category will be created if they do not exist yet.

Map.Instructions: Drop Actors/Scenes/Items/Journal pages on the map to create markers. Drag markers to reposition. Right-click a marker to radial menu.
Map.GeoJsonInstructions: Drop Actors/Scenes/Items/Journal pages on the GeoJSON map to create markers. Use the layer selector to show or hide configured map layers.
Map.BaseInstructions: Drop Actors/Scenes/Items/Journal pages on the map to create markers. Drag markers to reposition. Right-click a marker to radial menu.
Map.ImageInstructions: Drop Actors/Scenes/Items/Journal pages on the image map to create markers. Drag markers to reposition. Right-click a marker to radial menu.

Force.Instructions:
Shift + Drag: Link Nodes
Ctrl/Cmd + Click: Select Nodes for Group
Drag: Move/Position Nodes or Groups
Scroll: Zoom
DblClick: Open Sheet
Right Click: Node, Link, or Group Actions

VisTimeline.Instructions:
Use relations for creating new lanes
Click on Node: Select Node for editing position, range (if ranged) and lane
Scroll: Zoom
ALT+Left Click: Add a free item
ALT+SHIFT+Left Click: Add a ranged item
DblClick: Open Sheet
Right Click: Radial menu for delete or open sheet
Drop: Add element to timeline
Ctrl Drop: To drop a ranged type item with default duration (can be resized immediately after drop)

ImageSlots.Instructions:
Drag: Move nodes and drop them into slots
Shift + Click (when linking mode is enabled): Link nodes
Scroll: Zoom
DblClick: Open sheet
Right Click: Delete node or link

Genealogy.Instructions:
'Link Nodes' button: To Activate Link Mode
Click on Node: Select Parent Node
Drop: Link Dropped Actor as Child
Scroll: Zoom
DblClick: Open Sheet
Left Click: Delete Node with all descendants
Ctrl Click: To drag for re-parenting
Genealogy.DeleteStartPromote: Delete node "{name}" and all descendants? One of its parents will be promoted to graph start.
Genealogy.DeleteWholeGraph: By deleting "{name}" you are deleting the whole graph. Are you sure?
